mapper.sql: snapshot_id, tenant_id, period, disclosure_type, status, data_payload::text AS data_payload, statistics_version, payload_hash, composed_by_user_id, composed_at, governance_lock_id, locked_at, published_at, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_finance_disclosure_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_finance_disclosure_snapshot ( tenant_id, period, disclosure_type, status, data_payload, statistics_version, payload_hash, composed_by_user_id, composed_at, governance_lock_id, locked_at, published_at, version ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{period}, #{disclosureType}, #{status}, CAST(#{dataPayload} AS JSONB), #{statisticsVersion}, #{payloadHash}, #{composedByUserId}, #{composedAt}, #{governanceLockId}, #{lockedAt}, #{publishedAt}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_finance_disclosure_snapshot SET status = #{status}, data_payload = CAST(#{dataPayload} AS JSONB), governance_lock_id = #{governanceLockId}, locked_at = #{lockedAt}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND version = #{version}
